name: Tongcheng-Elong Holdings Limited
summary: Tongcheng-Elong Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides travel related services in the People's Republic of China. It offers various products and services covering a range of aspects of travel, including transportation ticketing, accommodation reservation, and various ancillary value-added products and services. The company also provides online advertising services, technology consulting and services, and insurance agency services. It provides its travel products and services through its tencent-based online platforms, mobile apps, and websites. The company was formerly known as China E-Dragon Holdings Limited and changed its name to Tongcheng-Elong Holdings Limited in March 2018. Tongcheng-Elong Holdings Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Suzhou, the People's Republic of China.
